title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 55.130 - Shall countersign all warrants (second class and certain first class counties)
text:
55.130.  Shall countersign all warrants (second class and certain first class counties). — The county auditor of each county of the first class not having a charter form of government and of each county of the second class shall countersign all warrants issued by the county commission, and shall keep a record of the date thereof, the number of same, to whom issued, the amount thereof, and upon what fund drawn.
(RSMo 1939 § 13870, A.L. 1973 H.B. 678) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12207; 1919 § 9065; 1909 § 3826
